name: Sunrise Autoland
description_short: Used car dealership in Jamaica, Queens offering in-house auto financing with sub-prime lending options for buyers with poor or no credit history.
description_long:
Sunrise Autoland is an established used car dealership located at 91-35 183 Street in Jamaica, Queens, New York, operating since 2003. The dealership serves the greater Queens, Long Island, and surrounding New York areas including Elmont, Valley Stream, Floral Park, and Hempstead. They maintain an inventory of pre-owned vehicles spanning 19+ major brands including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Land Rover, Tesla, and mainstream manufacturers like Honda, Toyota, and Nissan.

The company's primary offering is used vehicle sales combined with in-house auto financing services. Their finance department claims to work with most major banks and lending institutions throughout New York to facilitate car loans. Notably, they explicitly advertise sub-prime financing capabilities and market themselves to consumers with poor credit, bad credit, or no credit history, positioning credit challenges as potentially manageable obstacles rather than disqualifying factors. They also offer extended service contracts and warranties on selected vehicles in their inventory.

Sunrise Autoland distinguishes itself through accessibility-focused financing rather than premium inventory or luxury positioning. Their vehicles range from budget-friendly options (sub-$10,000) to higher-end luxury and performance vehicles, with online tools allowing customers to filter by price point. Operating hours are customer-friendly (Monday-Saturday 9 AM-7:30 PM, Sunday 10:30 AM-5 PM), and they provide online vehicle finder tools, financing applications, and appointment scheduling through their website.

However, prospective customers should note this is fundamentally a used car dealership, not a consumer finance company offering standalone personal loans. The financing they arrange is vehicle-specific and contingent on purchasing from their inventory. As a dealership emphasizing sub-prime lending, borrowers should carefully review APR rates, warranty terms, and total cost of ownership before committing.
pros: Explicitly works with sub-prime lending and advertises financing for bad/no credit borrowers
Diverse inventory spanning 19+ brands with price-point filters ($10K-$20K+ ranges available)
In-house financing department relationships with multiple banks and NY lending institutions
Extended service contracts and warranties available on inspected vehicles
Extended business hours including weekends (open Sundays 10:30 AM-5 PM)
Online tools for vehicle search, financing applications, and appointment scheduling
Serves broad geographic area across Queens, Long Island, and surrounding NY communities
cons: Financing only available when purchasing vehicles from their lot; not standalone personal loans
Website provides no specific APR ranges, financing terms, or rate transparency for sub-prime offerings
No information about credit score minimums, down payment requirements, or approval likelihood
Limited dealer reviews or third-party credibility indicators visible on website
Sub-prime lending often carries significantly higher interest rates than prime alternatives
best_for: Used car buyers in the Queens/Long Island area with poor or limited credit history
Consumers needing in-house financing without bank approval processes
Budget-conscious buyers seeking vehicles in the $10K-$20K price range
diagnosis: Sunrise Autoland is best suited for used car buyers in the Queens/Long Island area with imperfect credit histories who need in-house financing to complete a vehicle purchase. The primary caveat is that this is a dealership offering vehicle-contingent financing, not a standalone personal loan lender—borrowers must purchase from their inventory to access financing, and APR/term details are not publicly disclosed, requiring direct contact for rate transparency.
services: Used vehicle sales (19+ brands across 200+ inventory vehicles)
Sub-prime auto financing for bad credit, poor credit, and no credit borrowers
Bank and lending institution partnerships for traditional auto loans
Extended service contracts and warranties on selected vehicles
Online vehicle finder and price-filtered search tools
Free driving directions and GPS navigation
Monday-Sunday showroom hours with flexible scheduling
